title: Fish in Beer Batter

seo.title: Fish in Beer Batter - Marinda Kook

html:
Ingredients

  • 250 ml cake flour
  • 250 ml cornflour (Maizena)
  • 1 x 340 ml bottle beer
  • 1 egg
  • pinch of salt
  • 750 g thick stockfish fillets (hake), cut into medium portions
  • oil for frying

Method

Sift the flour and cornflour together into a bowl.

Then add the beer, egg and salt and whisk thoroughly with a balloon whisk until well combined and no lumps are visible.

Let it stand in the fridge for 20 – 30 minutes.

Heat oil in a deep pan, pat the fish dry with kitchen paper and dip the fish in the batter to coat each portion thoroughly.

Fry the fish in hot oil until golden brown and cooked through. Drain on kitchen paper and serve.

Serves 4 with chips, tartare sauce and/or a lovely fresh salad.

Easy!
